title: lycopodium obscurum f. strictum
intro: Lycopodium obscurum f. strictum, also known as Stiff Club Moss, is a variety of the Lycopodium obscurum plant that belongs to the lycopodiaceous family. It is a type of evergreen perennial plant that is native to Europe, Asia, and North America. The medicinal properties of Lycopodium obscurum f. strictum include its expectorant, diuretic, and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be used to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, and urinary problems. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to relieve congestion, reduce inflammation, and improve digestion, and it can be prepared as a tincture, tea, or capsule for herbal use.
